articles.author: Pan Pylas
articles.title: Starmer hosts Zelenskyy, Macron and Merz as Russian strikes kill 3 in Ukraine - AP News
articles.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has insisted that Europe play a key role in any negotiations to end the war with Russia as he arrived for talks in London with key European allies. Ahead of the meeting Sunday evening hosted by British Prime Minister Ke…
articles.content: LONDON (AP) Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy insisted Sunday that Europe must play a key role in any negotiations to end the war with Russia as he arrived for talks in London with staunch Euro… [+2963 chars]
